channel.title: Posts on Rack Myself
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Rack Myself

item.title: Best Mini PCs for a Homelab in 2026 (Under $300)
item.description: The best mini PCs for running a homelab on a budget. We cover top picks under $300 for Docker, Proxmox, NAS, and home server workloads in 2026.

item.title: Best NAS Drives for a Home Server in 2026
item.description: The best NAS hard drives for a home server or DIY NAS build in 2026. We compare WD Red, Seagate IronWolf, and CMR vs SMR — what actually matters.

item.title: Docker Compose for Beginners: Run Any App in Minutes
item.description: Learn Docker Compose from scratch. This beginner guide explains containers, docker-compose.yml, and how to run real self-hosted apps on your home server.

item.title: How to Run a Local LLM on a Consumer GPU (3090, 4090, etc.)
item.description: A practical guide to running large language models on consumer NVIDIA GPUs. Which models fit in which VRAM, what to buy, and how to set it all up.

item.title: How to Run Ollama on a Home Server (Local AI Without the Cloud)
item.description: Run powerful AI models like Llama 3, Mistral, and Phi locally on your home server with Ollama. No subscriptions, no data leaks, no cloud dependency.

item.title: How to Self-Host Open WebUI and Access It From Anywhere
item.description: Set up Open WebUI on your home server with Docker, connect it to Ollama, and expose it securely via Cloudflare Tunnels for access anywhere.

item.title: How to Set Up a Reverse Proxy With Cloudflare Tunnels (No Port Forwarding)
item.description: Expose your self-hosted apps to the internet securely using Cloudflare Tunnels. No port forwarding, no exposed home IP, free SSL included.

item.title: OpenWrt on the Linksys WRT3200ACM: Is It Worth It?
item.description: A real-world look at installing OpenWrt on the Linksys WRT3200ACM router. Performance, features, and whether it's still worth buying in 2026.

item.title: Self-Hosting vs. The Cloud: When It Actually Makes Sense
item.description: An honest comparison of self-hosting vs cloud services. When self-hosting saves money and gives you control, and when it's just more work for the same result.

item.title: The Beginner Homelab: What to Buy First and Why
item.description: Your first homelab doesn't need to be expensive or complicated. Here's exactly what to buy first, what to skip, and how to start running real services today.
